claims.summary: The telemetry port handles connection lifecycle, ping/pong, close, and bounded exponential reconnect backoff.
claims.disposition: verify existing behavior with source and WebSocket tests

claims.summary: Each accepted packet is decoded once into a typed Minime observation before bridge evidence and compatibility views are derived.
claims.disposition: verify the typed provenance path and compatibility parity

claims.summary: Malformed telemetry surfaces a parse error, while an unsupported telemetry major retains the last valid sample and records incompatibility.
